---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Vulture
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve. Who benefits from this feature?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include details about:

- Which components are affected (frontend, backend, agents, CLI)
- Any new API endpoints or SSE events needed
- Any new agent skills or audit capabilities
- Configuration options (environment variables, UI settings)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why they were not sufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here. If this relates to adding a new audit type, refer to the agent extensibility guide in the architecture docs.
